description: Removes embedded subtitle streams from video files using ffmpeg. Optionally OCR-converts PGS (Blu-ray image) subtitles to .srt sidecars via pgsrip before stripping.
name: Subtitle Stripper
overview: Strips embedded subtitles from your Jellyfin library. Supports dry-run, backups, library scoping, and optional PGS→SRT OCR conversion.
